zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hendley於大約1400年出生在英國肯特可藍別盧可時，他的父親Thomas Hendley26歲，母親Sarah Todd26歲。他於1420年與Mary Forster在英國肯特可藍別盧可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年11月8日在他的家鄉享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hendley于大约1400年出生在英国肯特可藍別盧可时，他的父亲Thomas Hendley26岁，母亲Sarah Todd26岁。他于1420年与Mary Forster在英国肯特可藍別盧可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年11月8日在他的家乡享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hendley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hanley or else a variant of Henley with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hanley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conor, Declan, Donovan, Eamonn, John Patrick.

Irish: shortened form of O'Hanley, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁinle ‘descendant of Áinle’, a personal name meaning ‘champion’. This is the name of a former ruling family in Connacht and is now common throughout southern Ireland.

English: habitational name from any of the many places called Handley (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Dorset, Northamptonshire) or Hanley (Staffordshire, Worcestershire), named with Old English hēan, the weak dative form (originally used after a preposition and article) of hēah ‘high’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hendley was born about 1400, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, his father, Thomas Hendley, was 26 and his mother, Sarah Todd, was 26. He married Mary Forster in 1420, in Cranbrook, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 8 November 1472, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hendley est né environ 1400, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Hendley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sarah Todd, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mary Forster en 1420, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1472, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hendleyが約1400年にイギリスケントクランブルークで生まれた時，父Thomas Hendleyは26歳，母Sarah Toddは26歳であった。1420年にイギリスケントクランブルークでMary Forsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年11月8日に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hendley(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hendley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Todd(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 Mary Forster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 11월 8일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Mary Forster em 1420, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1472, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hendley родился около 1400 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Hendley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Todd, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Forster в 1420 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 8 ноября 1472 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.
